params = []
sql = "SELECT id, email, role FROM users WHERE 1=1 "

if role:
    sql += "AND role = %s "
    params.append(role)

if email:
    sql += "AND email LIKE %s "
    params.append(f"%{email}%")

cursor.execute(sql, tuple(params))
